product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-LIVE-API-BASE-AUTHORITY exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp sync --live with repository binding api_base_url set to selected httptest.Server A and GITCODE_API_URL set to non-authoritative httptest.Server B, asserting only server A receives requests.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-DOCTOR-LIVE-JSON-STARTUP-SNAPSHOT exercises the real CLI doctor --live --format json route with the same effective repository binding snapshot, asserting provider_mode live-http, credential source, effective cache path, selected api_base_url, no token leakage, and zero server requests.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-LIVE-BINDING-INVALID-URL-NO-HTTP exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp sync --live with an invalid repository api_base_url, asserting a configuration diagnostic before live HTTP construction and zero mock-server requests.
go test ./... is run by run.sh as the offline acceptance gate so these CLI integration scenarios remain executable under the repository-wide test command.
freshness: Current target runtime at validation execution time with fresh temporary config/cache paths created by Go tests and no live GitCode credentials, live network access, real device access, or OS Keychain access.

mocks_used.httptest.Server: Mocks only external GitCode-compatible HTTP endpoints and records selected/non-selected request counts while exercising production CLI startup, repository binding, live provider routing, sync, and doctor routes.
mocks_used.environment isolation: run.sh unsets GITCODE_TOKEN, GITCODE_MCP_TEST_KEYCHAIN_TOKEN, and GITCODE_API_URL before invoking Go tests so each scenario uses only its explicit test setup.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/003-repository-binding-task-1-resolve-live-repository-binding/. No production source, production docs, runtime code, server code, app code, root AGENTS.md, or product configuration is modified by this validation materialization.

live_validation.reason: Live validation is disabled for this task. All evidence is deterministic offline validation using stubbed external dependencies only.

device_validation.reason: Device validation is disabled for this task.
